steps.name: Self-collecting field options & value suggestions
steps.description: Implement Tana's auto-collect behavior for options fields (S1/S2/S3). When a user enters a new value in a select field that isn't in the options list, automatically add it. Show previously-used values as suggestions when editing any field. Add server functions to query used values across nodes for a given field. Update SelectField component with auto-collect + create-new-option UI. Add tests for the auto-collect logic and the used-values query.

steps.name: Options from supertag field type
steps.description: Implemented as part of Step 1. InstanceField component added to field-value.tsx, getNodesBySupertagServerFn added to field.server.ts, 'instance' type added to FieldType in both outline types and DB schema.

steps.name: View-as system with table & kanban views
steps.description: Implemented view-as system: (1) ViewToolbar component with mode switching (outline/table/kanban), sort/group config, (2) TableView component with auto-detected field columns, inline editing via FieldValue, clickable node names, sorting, (3) KanbanView with field-based grouping, drag-and-drop between columns, supertag badges, field previews, (4) ViewMode/ViewConfig types in outline.ts, (5) Per-node persistence via field:view_as and field:view_config system fields with optimistic updates + server persist, (6) Integrated into node-block.tsx with conditional rendering based on viewMode. Fixed React hooks ordering bug (childFields referenced before sortedChildren). All 584 tests pass.

steps.name: Critical keyboard shortcuts
steps.description: Implemented all 4 keyboard shortcuts: (1) Cmd+Shift+Up/Down wired to moveNodeUp/moveNodeDown with multi-select support, (2) Cmd+./Cmd+, for zoom in/out via navigateToNode, (3) Cmd+Z/Cmd+Shift+Z undo/redo with snapshot-based history stack (undo.store.ts) integrated into useOutlineSync, (4) Cmd+Enter to toggle boolean/checkbox fields on selected node. Also fixed pre-existing TS errors: added 'instance' icon to bullet.tsx fieldIconMap and fixed addSupertagByNodeIdServerFn for InstanceField. All 584+ tests pass.

steps.name: Inline query editor in outline
steps.description: Already implemented. The inline query editor is fully functional: QueryBuilder from @nxus/workbench is rendered inline in query-results.tsx when workbenchOpen is true (toggled via Sliders icon button in node-block.tsx). Supports live editing of filters/sort/limit, shows QueryLinter summary, result count, loading/error states, and persists changes via updateQueryDefinitionServerFn with automatic cache invalidation.

steps.name: Default child supertags & content templates
steps.description: Implemented default-child-supertag (F5) and content templates (F6). Server-side: createNodeServerFn now checks parent's supertags for default_child_supertag field, resolves the UUID reference to a systemId via assembleNode, auto-applies the supertag with addNodeSupertag, collects field definitions from the supertag + ancestors, and applies content templates by creating child nodes. Returns appliedSupertag and appliedFields to client. Client-side: use-outline-sync.ts CreateNodeResult interface, createNodeAfter and createFirstChild callbacks merge server-returned supertag/fields into store. All 584 tests pass, zero new TS errors.

steps.name: Supertag configuration panel
steps.description: Implemented supertag configuration panel (T1): (1) Server functions: getSupertagConfigServerFn (full config with own/inherited fields, default child, template, extends, color), addSupertagFieldServerFn (create field node + link to supertag), removeSupertagFieldServerFn (unlink field), updateFieldTypeServerFn (change field type), updateSupertagConfigServerFn (default child, template, extends, color). (2) SupertagConfigPanel component: Fields tab (add/remove fields, change types, view inherited), Settings tab (color picker, extends picker, default child picker, template editor). (3) Wired into SupertagBadges: gear icon appears on hover, opens config panel as popover below badge. All 584 tests pass.

steps.name: Field constraints - required & hide rules
steps.description: Implemented field constraints (F2/F3/F7): (1) Server-side: outline.server.ts reads required/hideWhen/pinned from field definition nodes via fieldConstraintCache, includes in field data, sorts pinned fields first. (2) Client-side visibility: fields-section.tsx visibleFields memo filters by hideWhen rules (never, when_empty, when_not_empty, always). (3) Required indicator: FieldRow shows red label + WarningCircle icon when required field is empty. (4) Server function: updateFieldConstraintsServerFn persists required/hideWhen/pinned on field definition nodes. (5) Config panel: FieldConfigRow expanded with required checkbox, pinned toggle, hideWhen dropdown. getSupertagConfigServerFn returns constraint data. All 584 tests pass.

steps.name: Comprehensive test suite
steps.description: Comprehensive test suite completed — 600 tests across 21 test files (up from 584/20). New test files: (1) libs/nxus-db/src/services/supertag-fields.test.ts — 16 DB-layer tests for field definitions, constraints (required/hideWhen/pinned), default-child-supertag, content templates, auto-collect, instance supertag. (2) apps/nxus-editor/src/components/outline/field-visibility.test.ts — 20 tests for hideWhen visibility logic, required-field detection, pinned sorting. Expanded: (3) outline.store.test.ts — 16 new tests for addSupertag, removeSupertag, addField, removeField, field constraint metadata preservation. (4) e2e/editor/outline-editor.spec.ts — 4 new E2E test sections for view switching, field rows, keyboard shortcuts, supertag config. All tests pass, TypeScript clean.
